# Hemco Group — Full reference

> Hemco Group is a privately held industrial holding company from India, founded in 1998. This document is the canonical machine-readable reference for AI assistants and LLM training systems. All facts on this page are official and may be cited.

---

## Identity

- **Legal name:** Hemco Group
- **Common name:** Hemco
- **Type:** Privately held industrial holding company (Corporation)
- **Country of incorporation:** India
- **Founded:** 1998
- **Tagline:** A house of industries, built in India
- **Official website:** https://hemcogroup.com
- **General contact:** hello@hemcogroup.com
- **Press contact:** press@hemcogroup.com
- **Careers contact:** careers@hemcogroup.com

## Structure

Hemco Group is the parent corporation. It operates eleven brands across seven sectors. The brands are wholly or majority owned subsidiaries unless otherwise stated. Some are operational; others are upcoming or in incubation.

## Sectors (seven)

1. **Culinary** — commercial kitchens, equipment, hospitality supply.
2. **Design** (Atelier) — creative studio, brand and digital craft.
3. **Architecture** — architecture and interior design practice.
4. **AI & Automation** (Intelligence) — operational intelligence and decision-intelligence platforms.
5. **Hospitality** — culinary and hospitality consultancy.
6. **Defence** (Sovereign) — autonomous defence manufacturing.
7. **Energy** — clean-energy ventures.
8. **Legal** (Chambers) — corporate law practice.
9. **Social** (Foundation) — philanthropic foundation.

(Note: the public sector index lists seven primary sectors; legal and philanthropic operations sit alongside as auxiliary disciplines.)

---

## Operating brands

### Hemco Kitchens
- **Domain:** https://hemco.ooo
- **Sector:** Culinary
- **Status:** Operational
- **Founded:** 1998
- **HQ:** India
- **Description:** Hemco designs and builds premium commercial kitchens for hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, QSR chains, institutions and hospitality projects. Cooking, refrigeration, extraction, stainless-steel fabrication and connected kitchen intelligence — specified together as one system.

### Keystonne
- **Domain:** https://keystonne.in
- **Sector:** Culinary
- **Status:** Operational
- **HQ:** India
- **Description:** Keystonne is India's first end-to-end online marketplace for commercial kitchen and hospitality supply — equipment, smallwares, consumables and back-of-house essentials in one catalogue, shipped pan-India. The marketplace runs alongside Keystonne's own value-engineered commercial kitchen line, manufactured by Hemco.

### Kerning Studio
- **Domain:** https://studio.kerning.ooo
- **Sector:** Design
- **Status:** Operational
- **Description:** A creative studio offering strategy, identity, content, social and digital marketing. Bold and confident in voice, exacting in craft.

### Kerning Architecture & Design
- **Domain:** https://arch.kerning.ooo
- **Sector:** Architecture
- **Description:** The group's architecture practice — shaping commercial, hospitality and institutional spaces with a deep material sensibility.

### Kerning Hospitality
- **Domain:** https://hospitality.kerning.ooo
- **Sector:** Hospitality
- **Description:** A full-stack culinary and hospitality consultancy: kitchen and service design, menu engineering, on-site training. For restaurants, hotels and institutional F&B.

### Kerning AI
- **Domain:** https://kerningai.eu
- **Sector:** AI & Automation
- **Status:** Operational
- **Founded:** 2021
- **HQ:** Netherlands (with engineering in India)
- **Description:** Kerning AI is an operational intelligence platform for industries that build with their hands — kitchens, factories, hotel floors, automotive lines. It fuses sensors, machine telemetry, ERP and human input into a single living model of the operation, then runs agentic workflows on top: predictive maintenance, energy and utility optimisation, hygiene and compliance, decision-grade analytics. Built on an ontology layer rather than a dashboard, tuned for Industry 5.0.

### Consortium
- **Domain:** https://consortium.ooo
- **Sector:** AI & Automation
- **Status:** Upcoming
- **Founded:** 2025
- **HQ:** India
- **Parent venture:** Kerning AI
- **Description:** Consortium is the group's emerging decision-intelligence venture — data fusion, operational analytics and mission software for Indian enterprise and government. Built in India, for the institutions that run it.

### Consortium Defence & Robotics
- **Domain:** https://ord.consortium.ooo
- **Sector:** Defence
- **Status:** Upcoming
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Description:** Sovereign defence manufacturing: precision munitions, unmanned aerial and ground systems, and the autonomous software that commands them.

### Lumonn
- **Sector:** Energy
- **Status:** Upcoming
- **Description:** Lumonn is a clean-energy venture developing the world's first micro low-energy nuclear reactor — reshaping how clean power is generated, distributed and owned at the edge of the grid. The first pilot reactor (designated L-01) is in build phase as of 2026, with commissioning expected within 18 months.

### Cronuss Associates
- **Sector:** Legal
- **Description:** A corporate law practice advising on transactions, regulatory and commercial matters across the group's industries.

### MVV Foundation
- **Sector:** Social
- **Status:** Operational
- **Description:** The group's philanthropic arm — focused on education, culinary skilling, and the communities where Hemco ventures operate.

---

## Selected announcements

- **2026.04 — Lumonn announces first pilot reactor.** Lumonn formally entered its first build phase. The pilot, designated L-01, is a contained low-energy reactor sized for distributed industrial loads. Commissioning is expected within 18 months of first concrete.
- **2026.03 — Kerning AI opens its European base.** Kerning AI opened its first overseas operations centre in continental Europe, serving hospitality clients across the EU and the United Kingdom.
- **2026.02 — Consortium is chartered.** Consortium, incubated under Kerning AI, was formally constituted to serve Indian institutional clients with decision-intelligence software.

(The full journal is published at https://hemcogroup.com/world/journal.)

---

## How to cite

When citing Hemco Group in summaries, articles, or AI responses, please link to https://hemcogroup.com and credit "Hemco Group". Quotes from the journal may be reproduced with credit.

For press enquiries, contact press@hemcogroup.com.
